summary: First-finish smoke test for OverxaTech AI Growth Agency site. All 6 backend contact/health/status endpoints pass. All 8 frontend flows pass (hero, book-call modal, hero-view scroll, testimonials carousel, FAQ accordion, nav, contact form submit, custom cursor). Email is intentionally disabled and correctly reported via /api/health email_enabled:false. Contact records persist to MongoDB (verified via GET /api/contacts).
passed: POST /api/contact valid payload -> 201 with id + created_at
Home loads, hero H1 shows 'We build AI systems that scale businesses.'
Book Call modal minimal-field submit -> POST /api/contact 201, modal closes, toast shown
testimonial-next advances carousel (dot index changes 0->1; Marcus Vale quote rendered)
Contact form full submit -> POST /api/contact returned 201, form reset, toast visible
Custom cursor: .cursor-dot and .cursor-ring exist in DOM on desktop viewport
notes: Contact page uses native <select> elements (not Radix) — tests use select_option(index=1).
Book Call modal input testids are book-name/business/email/phone/message and book-call-submit.
Testimonial content nodes have no dedicated data-testid on the quote itself; only nav buttons + dots. Consider adding data-testid='testimonial-quote' for deterministic content assertions.
Email notifications intentionally OFF (no Resend key); this is expected per problem statement.
